name: Singapore
plain_words: GST at 9% on what you sell. Register when revenue passes S$1 million. Corporate income tax 17% flat. Individual income tax progressive 0% to 24%. No capital gains tax. Simple by design.

taxes.name: GST
taxes.plain_words: Goods and Services Tax at 9% on what you sell. Register when annual revenue passes S$1 million. File quarterly.
taxes.notes: Rate raised from 8% to 9% on 1 January 2024. Compulsory registration at S$1M turnover.

deadlines.name: quarterly_return
deadlines.detail: File within 30 days after quarter ends

taxes.name: Corporate Income Tax
taxes.plain_words: Corporate profits taxed at 17% flat. File estimated chargeable income within 3 months of financial year end. File annual return by 30 November.
taxes.notes: Flat rate. Partial tax exemption for first S$300,000 of chargeable income. Start-up exemption available for first 3 years.

deadlines.name: eci_filing
deadlines.detail: Estimated Chargeable Income within 3 months of FY end

taxes.name: Individual Income Tax
taxes.plain_words: Progressive from 0% to 24%. First S$20,000 is tax-free. File by 18 April (paper) or 18 April (electronic). No capital gains tax.
taxes.notes: Tax residents: progressive rates. Non-residents: 15% flat or prevailing rate, whichever higher. No tax on capital gains.

deadlines.name: electronic_filing
deadlines.penalty: Late filing penalty 5% of tax, up to 200% for severe cases
